TOKEN SWAP Work

How Token-SwapWorks

  • Speed Growth
  • New Opportunities
01

Identify Supported Tokens

Own tokens from an unsuccessful project? Check if it’s listed on Token-Swap.net.

02

Meet Airdrop Criteria

To qualify for a new token airdrop, meet a few simple requirements like providing your wallet address, paying a small participation fee, or fulfilling other criteria set by the project.

03

Receive New Tokens

Once qualified, you’ll receive tokens from innovative projects with the potential to grow and succeed.

Why TOKEN SWAP?

Why Choose Token-Swap.net?

  • Turn Losses into Opportunities
    Exchange tokens from underperforming projects for new opportunities in growing markets.

  • Connect with Market Leaders
    Access tokens from successful projects shaping the future of the blockchain ecosystem.

  • Community-Centric Approach
    We partner with projects that prioritize community engagement and offer real benefits to token holders.

FAQ

Quick Questions

Join Today
What is Token-Swap.net?

Token-Swap.net is a platform that allows token holders to exchange tokens from underperforming or unsuccessful projects for new tokens from emerging, promising blockchain projects. We help users unlock new potential from their existing assets.

How do I know if my tokens are eligible for a swap?

To check if your tokens are eligible, simply browse our list of supported tokens on the Token-Swap.net platform. If your tokens are listed, you’ll be able to begin the swap process.

what are the requirements to qualify for a token swap?

Each project sets its own requirements, which may include providing a valid wallet address, paying a small participation fee, or meeting specific conditions for eligibility. The full criteria will be outlined during the swap process.

How long does it take to receive the new tokens after qualifying for the swap?

Once you meet the eligibility criteria and complete the necessary steps, it typically takes a few days to process and transfer your new tokens. Exact timing may vary depending on the project.
